title: Hugged by Jesus: Trump shares new AI image as his feud with the Pope escalates
shortDescription: Despite enraging some of his religious base who have called his postings blasphemous, President Trump continues to share AI imagery that meshes him and Jesus..

title: Mamdani's push to tax the rich gets a partial win from NY governor
shortDescription: The pied-à-terre tax puts an annual surcharge on homes valued above $5 million when there is no resident who lives primarily in New York City.

title: 'America’s children rely on us': Melania Trump pushes for foster care reforms
shortDescription: Melania Trump met with lawmakers to discuss new bills tied to her "Fostering the Future" initiative, aiming to reform foster care.

title: Iowa GOP SOS raises 'serious concerns' with Trump's mail voting order
shortDescription: "The U.S. Constitution says elections are run by the states," Iowa Secretary of State Paul Pate, a Republican, told reporters.

title: Senate blocks effort to end Iran war, again
shortDescription: Senate Republicans again blocked a measure to halt American hostilities in the war with Iran.

title: Melania Trump speaks at Capitol Hill roundtable on foster care policy
shortDescription: First lady Melania Trump participated in a Capitol Hill roundtable to discuss legislation aimed at protecting America’s foster care children.

title: White House denies requesting ceasefire extension
shortDescription: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt told journalists that reports of the U.S. requesting a ceasefire extension with Iran are false.

title: Senate again blocks effort to end Iran war, but tougher votes are coming
shortDescription: The Senate on Wednesday again blocked a resolution that would halt American hostilities against Iran. Democrats aren't done forcing similar votes.

title: Trump challenges NATO over Iran conflict support
shortDescription: President Trump criticizes NATO allies for refusing to assist the U.S. in the Iran conflict on Fox Business's "Mornings with Maria."

title: Trevor Noah reacts to Trump's Grammys lawsuit threat in Netflix show
shortDescription: Trevor Noah joked about Donald Trump at the Grammys this year, and Trump threatened to sue him on Truth Social. Noah reacted in his new Netflix special.

title: Appeals court shields Trump admin from probe over deportation flights
shortDescription: A three-judge panel of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the DC Circuit faulted Judge James Boasberg in a standoff over the limits of presidential power.

title: Trump says he'll fire Fed chair
shortDescription: In a Fox Business interview, President Donald Trump said he would not drop the investigation into Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell.

title: Melania Trump is back in public life. What does she want to say?
shortDescription: An increasingly present Melania Trump, sometimes settling scores, has emerged in recent months.

title: Democrats want to invoke 25th amendment
shortDescription: Democrats are attempting to invoke the 25th Amendment against President Donald Trump.

title: Daily Briefing: Check your taxes
shortDescription: If you haven't filed yet, you can ask for an automatic extension and more news to know on Wednesday.

title: Are Trump's tariffs really dead? Here's what's happening behind the scenes
shortDescription: Importers of European cheese, a sleeping bag company for infants and a ceramics business are pushing for and against potential new tariffs.

title: DOJ seeks to throw out convictions related to Jan. 6 Capitol riots
shortDescription: On April 14, the Justice Department asked a federal appeals court to throw out convictions against leaders of the Proud Boys and Oath Keepers.

title: Vance addresses Trump's feud with Pope Leo
shortDescription: Vice President JD Vance spoke at a Turning Point USA tour event about his perspective on President Donald Trump's feud with Pope Leo.
